/usr/bin/c++ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/group_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/offlinemessagemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/usermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o -o /home/xy111/chat/chatserver/bin/ChatServer  -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread
